creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Mon Aug 20 01:16:17 2012
New Revision: 302773
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302773

Log:
  trytond_party is the party module for trytond.
  
  The party module defines the concepts of party, category and
  contact mechanism. It also comes with reports to print labels
  and letters and a Check VIES wizard.
  
  WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
  
  PR:		170559
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias@d2ux.net>

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_party/
  head/finance/trytond_party/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_party/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_party/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_party/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Mon Aug 20 01:03:48 2012	(r302772)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Mon Aug 20 01:16:17 2012	(r302773)
@@ -106,6 +106,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond
     SUBDIR += trytond_country
     SUBDIR += trytond_currency
+    SUBDIR += trytond_party
     SUBDIR += trytond_product
     SUBDIR += venice
     SUBDIR += weberp

Added: head/finance/trytond_party/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_party/Makefile	Mon Aug 20 01:16:17 2012	(r302773)
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	trytond_party
+# Date created:		12 August, 2012
+# Whom:			Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_party
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	The Party Module for Tryton
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_country>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_country \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}vatnumber>=1.0.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/py-vatnumber
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_party/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_party/distinfo	Mon Aug 20 01:16:17 2012	(r302773)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_party-2.4.0.tar.gz) = d0ba5a6ddf57f254c650239608997ad46950e532d3da9e1af87f0a1e4231e723
+SIZE (trytond_party-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 53011

Added: head/finance/trytond_party/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_party/pkg-descr	Mon Aug 20 01:16:17 2012	(r302773)
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+trytond_party is the party module for trytond.
+
+The party module defines the concepts of party, category and
+contact mechanism. It also comes with reports to print labels
+and letters and a Check VIES wizard.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
